extortion.description: Ben's Asphalt is an asphalt maintenance & parking lot management company in Southern California with a national presence. The company was founded in 1961 and is headquartered in Santa Ana.We are ready to upload more than 100GB files of essential corporate documents such as: financial data (audit, payment details, invoices), employees and customers information (phones, emails, medical information) confidential information, NDAs and other documents with detailed personal information so on.
